name: plan-changes
description: Streams ./.conductor/plan.md edits as they happen (architect revisions, phase marks). Event-driven — no heartbeat.

name: ci-status
description: Polls `gh run list` for the current branch every 60s; emits ONLY on state transitions (queued → in_progress → success/failure). No heartbeats.

name: verifier-events
description: Tails ./.conductor/reports/*.json for new verifier outputs; surfaces verified=false events immediately. Event-driven — no heartbeat.
